"'''The Smugglers of Naboo'''" is a free Role Playing Game Supplement released by [[Wizards of the Coast]] designed to promote their [[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|Invasion of Theed]] game, which is a simplified introduction to the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. In it, the players each take one of four pre-made characters, either [[Rann I-Kanu]], [[Galak]], [[Arani Korden]] or [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]].

In game, Rann's master Ali-Vor has sent Rann and his companions to Naboo to investigate rumors of smugglers poaching animals on the planet, thinking that though the rumors are likely false, it would be good experience for the Padawan. Thus the adventure begins.

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adventure}}

==Continuity==
The ''Smugglers of Naboo'' Fast-Play Game is a reprinted version of ''[[The Predators]]'', an adventure from issue [[Star Wars Gamer 2|2]] of [[Star Wars Gamer]] magazine. The only alteration is a change to the spelling of Professor [[Tasrah Boh]]'s first name. ''The Predators'' printing uses the spelling "Tasrach" for the character in several instances.
